name: causalontology/causalontology
description: The PHP binding of the Causalontology standard - reified causation as a language-neutral standard and shared commons. Bundled sodium/hash extensions only; passes all 38 frozen conformance vectors. (Sources under bindings/php/; this root manifest exists because Packagist reads the repository root, like Package.swift for SwiftPM.)

extra.license-note: The attribution always; no profit, no problem license. (Apache License 2.0 text)
